title: '"Kimi wo Aisuru Ki wa Nai" to Itta Jiki Koushaku-sama ga Nazeka Dekiai shitekimasu' Announces Supporting Cast Pair
content: The official website for the television anime adaptation of Kei Misawa and Natsu Mizuno 's "Kimi wo Aisuru Ki wa Nai" to Itta Jiki Koushaku-sama ga Nazeka Dekiai shitekimasu ( The Duke's Son Claims He Won't Love Me yet Showers Me with Adoration ) manga announced a pair of additional casts on Wednesday.
author: MyAnimeList

title: The Forsaken Saintess and Her Foodie Roadtrip in Another World Anime's Teaser Confirms July Debut on TV
content: Happinet posted the teaser promotional video for the anime of Yoneori 's The Forsaken Saintess and Her Foodie Roadtrip in Another World ( Suterare Seijo no Isekai Gohan Tabi: Kakure Skill de Camping Car o Shōkan Shimashita ) light novel series on Wednesday.
author: ANN

title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime Manga Volume 32 No Longer Listed as 'Final Volume'
content: Kadokawa 's Dengeki Online website updated and corrected its article about Taiki Kawakami 's 32nd manga volume based on Fuse and Mitz Vah 's That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime ( Tensei Shitara Slime Datta Ken ) light novel series on Wednesday.
author: ANN

title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime Manga Not Ending in Volume 32 on June 9 (Updated)
content: Update: Dengeki Online corrected its article so that it no longer lists That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime manga volume 32 as the "final volume." The previous version of this article follows below: Kadokawa 's Dengeki Online website announced on Tuesday that Taiki Kawakami 's manga adaptation of Fuse and Mitz Vah…
author: ANN

title: Reborn as a Vending Machine Season 3 Unveils English Dub's Cast, April 15 Launch
content: Crunchyroll announced on Tuesday it will release an English dub for the third anime season based on Hirukuma 's Reborn as a Vending Machine, I Now Wander the Dungeon ( Jidōhanbaiki ni Umarekawatta Ore wa Meikyū ni Samayō ) light novel series on Wednesday.
author: ANN

title: Future GPX Cyber Formula Series Gets New Short Anime Sequel, Game
content: Bandai Namco Filmworks announced on Wednesday that the Future GPX Cyber Formula series is getting a new short anime, a direct sequel to the 1998 Future GPX Cyber Formula Sin anime. The series is also getting a new game titled Future GPX Cyber Formula Spiral .
author: ANN

title: Light Novel 'Majo to Youhei' Gets TV Anime in 2027
content: Production company Bandai Namco Filmworks opened an official website for a television anime adaptation of Kaeru Chouhoukiteki 's Majo to Youhei ( Witch and Mercenary ) light novel on Wednesday, revealing the main cast, staff, a teaser visual (pictured above), and teaser promo. The anime series will air on NTV in 2027.
author: MyAnimeList

title: 'Azur Lane: Bisoku Zenshin! Ni!!' Reveals Additional Cast, Theme Song, Second Promo
content: • The official website of Azur Lane: Bisoku Zenshin! Ni!! ( Azur Lane: Slow Ahead! Season 2 ) revealed additional cast, the theme song, and the second promotional video on Monday. The new season is scheduled to premiere on July 6 at 1:00 a.m. on BS11, followed by Tokyo MX.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Kaeru Chōhōkiteki's Witch and Mercenary Novels Get TV Anime in 2027
content: Bandai Namco Entertainment announced on Wednesday that Kaeru Chōhōkiteki 's Witch and Mercenary ( Majo to Yōhei ) light novel series will get a television anime adaptation that will premiere on the NTV channel in 2027.
author: ANN

title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime Manga Ends in Volume 32 on June 9
content: Kadokawa 's Dengeki Online website announced on Tuesday that Taiki Kawakami 's manga adaptation of Fuse and Mitz Vah 's That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime ( Tensei Shitara Slime Datta Ken ) light novel series will end with its 32nd compiled book volume, which will ship on June 9.
author: ANN
